description: You need to perform an Engineering Change Order (ECO) on an existing 3D part. The current part is too thin and needs to be thickened to 6.0 mm for manufacturing. Open the model at /opt/solvespace_samples/base.slvs and modify its main extrusion thickness to exactly 6.0 mm. Save the updated model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/production/base_v2.slvs. Export the modified 3D solid as a STEP file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/production/base_v2.step and as an STL file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/production/base_v2.stl.
